title: erythroxylum cogolloi
intro: Erythroxylum cogolloi is a plant species native to South America, particularly in the Andean region, and is also known as the "cogollo plant" or "Andean coca". The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Erythroxylum cogolloi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
